title: PepeLand Totems
description: Resource pack that changes totems based on a player's name! 440+ totems are already waiting for you!
body:
Ресурспак в котором если вы переименуйте тотем бессмертия, допустим, в "felugoz", то у вас будет тотем со скином игрока "felugoz".

Optifine или CIT Resewn необходим!
Так-же, для удобного использования рекомендуем мод RP Renames.


<details>
<summary>English version:</summary>

Resource pack in which you will rename totem, for example, to "felugoz", you will get totem with skin of "felugoz".

Optifine or CIT Resewn is required!
We also recommend using RP Renames mod.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Итоги за сезоны - Results for the seasons:</summary>

- PepeLand 8: 440+ totems 
>   1st version: 12.06.2024 - Last version: 05.20.2024

</details>

[![pepeland](https://cdn.kelcuprum.ru/budge/pepeland/made%20for/cozy_64h.png)](https://pepeland.net) [![opti](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63150f7a318d1641d02a9443e0e39a67111e180a.png)](https://optifine.net/downloads)
[![CIT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48901bbcda12e6c450f4c6b1c34fd9dbfa7ebc74.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versions)
